2604.12652.title: PromptEcho: Annotation-Free Reward from Vision-Language Models for Text-to-Image Reinforcement Learning
2604.12652.paper_summary: Reinforcement learning (RL) can improve the prompt following capability of text-to-image (T2I) models, yet obtaining high-quality reward signals remains challenging: CLIP Score is too coarse-grained, while VLM-based reward models (e.g., RewardDance) require costly human-annotated preference data and additional fine-tuning. We propose PromptEcho, a reward construction method that requires \emph{no} annotation and \emph{no} reward model training. Given a generated image and a guiding query, PromptEcho computes the token-level cross-entropy loss of a frozen VLM with the original prompt as the label, directly extracting the image-text alignment knowledge encoded during VLM pretraining. The reward is deterministic, computationally efficient, and improves automatically as stronger open-source VLMs become available. For evaluation, we develop DenseAlignBench, a benchmark of concept-rich dense captions for rigorously testing prompt following capability. Experimental results on two state-of-the-art T2I models (Z-Image and QwenImage-2512) demonstrate that PromptEcho achieves substantial improvements on DenseAlignBench (+26.8pp / +16.2pp net win rate), along with consistent gains on GenEval, DPG-Bench, and TIIFBench without any task-specific training. Ablation studies confirm that PromptEcho comprehensively outperforms inference-based scoring with the same VLM, and that reward quality scales with VLM size. We will open-source the trained models and the DenseAlignBench.
2604.12652.paper_summary_zh: 強化學習 (RL) 可以改善文本到圖像 (T2I) 模型的提示跟隨能力，但獲得高品質的獎勵信號仍然具有挑戰性：CLIP 分數過於粗糙，而基於 VLM 的獎勵模型（例如 RewardDance）需要昂貴的人類標註偏好數據和額外的微調。我們提出了 PromptEcho，一種獎勵構建方法，該方法不需要任何標註和獎勵模型訓練。給定生成的圖像和指導查詢，PromptEcho 計算一個凍結的 VLM 的標記級交叉熵損失，以原始提示作為標籤，直接提取在 VLM 預訓練期間編碼的圖像-文本對齊知識。這個獎勵是確定性的，計算效率高，並且隨著更強大的開源 VLM 的可用性自動改善。為了評估，我們開發了 DenseAlignBench，一個概念豐富的密集標題基準，用於嚴格測試提示跟隨能力。在兩個最先進的 T2I 模型（Z-Image 和 QwenImage-2512）上的實驗結果顯示，PromptEcho 在 DenseAlignBench 上實現了顯著的改進（+26.8pp / +16.2pp 淨勝率），並在 GenEval、DPG-Bench 和 TIIFBench 上持續獲得增益，而無需任何特定任務的訓練。消融研究確認，PromptEcho 在同一 VLM 上全面超越基於推理的評分，並且獎勵質量隨著 VLM 的大小而增加。我們將開源訓練好的模型和 DenseAlignBench。
2604.12652.author: Jinlong Liu et.al.
2604.12652.authors: Jinlong Liu, Wanggui He, Peng Zhang, Mushui Liu, Hao Jiang, Pipei Huang
